title: How to Reset Your Active Directory / SSO Password
text:
Q: How do I reset my Active Directory or SSO password?
A: To reset your Active Directory or SSO password, follow these steps: Windows: Step 1: Press Ctrl + Alt + Delete on your keyboard. Step 2: Click on 'Change a password'. Step 3: Enter your old password, then your new password, and confirm the new password. Step 4: Click the arrow or press Enter to submit. macOS: Step 1: Open 'System Preferences' from the Apple menu. Step 2: Click on 'Users & Groups'. Step 3: Select your user account and click on 'Reset Password'. Step 4: Enter your old password, then your new password, and confirm the new password. Step 5: Click 'Change Password' to finalize the process. If you encounter any issues, please contact the IT helpdesk for assistance.
